title: selaginella cuprea
intro: Selaginella cuprea, also known as red rose or fire moss, is a species of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella cuprea include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Selaginella cuprea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
